name: babe-benchmark
content:
## Introduction

Systematic benchmark with diverse biology tasks enables fair comparison and identifies agent strengths/weaknesses. This approach enables practical implementation of advanced techniques without extensive theoretical background.

## Core Concept

Systematic benchmark with diverse biology tasks enables fair comparison and identifies agent strengths/weaknesses.

```
  │

  │
  └─→ Output
```
